title: Downtown Hub — 2BR/1BA in the Heart of Redmond
body:
2 bedrooms · 1 bath · Dog Friendly

Stay in the heart of Downtown Redmond, walking distance to restaurants, shops, and community events. Safe, quiet neighborhood with easy access to Highways 97 and 126.

📞 Text or Call Holli to inquire and check availability: 541-640-3800

title: High Desert Haven — Luxury Eagle Crest Retreat (4 En-Suite Bedrooms)
body:
4 private en-suite bedrooms · Hot tub · Game room · Fireplace

Ideal for families, golf foursomes, or couples seeking a relaxed getaway. Enjoy open-concept living and a fully stocked game room featuring a pool table, shuffleboard, foosball, and darts. Unwind in the hot tub or by the cozy fireplace after a day of play.

Your stay includes guest passes to all 3 Eagle Crest recreation centers.

📞 Text or Call Holli to inquire and check availability: 541-640-3800
